\section{E.2 Naming conventions}
\label{ch:app_e_figures:e-2-naming-conventions}

\begin{itemize}
\item Main figures: \texttt{fig\{N\}\_\{k\}\_descriptive\_name.png}  
\item Auxiliary: \texttt{aux\{N\}\_\{k\}\_...} or \texttt{aux\_z\_map\_*.png}  
\item In LaTeX: \texttt{\textbackslash{}includegraphics\{...\}} with \texttt{graphicspath} \(\rightarrow\) \texttt{figures/}  
\item Labels: \texttt{\textbackslash{}label\{fig:filename-stem\}}
\end{itemize}

\bigskip
\noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.4pt}
\bigskip
